Let me start by creating the minimal-saas.yaml template:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"create_or_rewrite_file","args":"{\"target_file\": \"/home/workspace/Skills/frontend/templates/minimal-saas.yaml\", \"content\": \"# Minimal SaaS Landing Page Template\\n# Clean, professional template based on Linear, Vercel, and Stripe patterns\\n\\n---\\n# TEMPLATE METADATA\\n\\nname: minimal-saas\\ndescription: |\\n  Clean, professional SaaS landing page. Works for B2B tools,\\n  developer products, and productivity apps. Emphasizes clarity\\n  and trust over flashiness. Ideal for established companies that\\n  want to communicate competence and reliability.\\n\\nsource: |\\n  Synthesized from Linear, Vercel, and Stripe landing page patterns.\\n  Captures the \\\"grown-up startup\\\" aesthetic with restrained color usage\\n  and emphasis on typography hierarchy.\\n\\ncreated: 2026-02-06\\n\\n---\\n# COLOR PALETTE\\n\\npalette:\\n  primary: \\\"#0A0A0A\\\"      # Near-black - primary text, key elements\\n  secondary: \\\"#525252\\\"    # Medium gray - secondary text, borders\\n  accent: \\\"#2563EB\\\"       # Professional blue - CTAs, links, highlights\\n  background: \\\"#FFFFFF\\\"   # Pure white - main page background\\n  surface: \\\"#FAFAFA\\\"      # Off-white - card backgrounds, sections\\n  text: \\\"#0A0A0A\\\"         # Near-black - high contrast body text\\n  text_muted: \\\"#737373\\\"   # Gray - secondary text, captions\\n\\n---\\n# TYPOGRAPHY\\n\\ntypography:\\n  heading_font: \\\"Inter\\\"\\n  body_font: \\\"Inter\\\"\\n  scale: normal\\n  heading_weight: 600\\n\\n---\\n# LAYOUT SETTINGS\\n\\nlayout:\\n  max_width: standard\\n  spacing: balanced\\n  border_radius: subtle\\n\\n---\\n# PAGE SECTIONS\\n\\nsections:\\n  - type: hero\\n    variant: centered\\n  \\n  - type: logos\\n    variant: simple\\n  \\n  - type: features\\n    variant: grid-3col\\n  \\n  - type: testimonials\\n    variant: single\\n  \\n  - type: cta\\n    variant: centered\\n\\n---\\n# STYLE NOTES\\n\\nstyle_notes: |\\n  Minimal, sophisticated aesthetic that relies on typography and spacing\\n  rather than color or ornamental elements. Key characteristics:\\n  \\n  - Typography-driven design with excellent hierarchy\\n  - Subtle shadows only (shadow-sm, shadow-md max)\\n  - No gradients — solid colors throughout\\n  - Generous whitespace between sections\\n  - Icons from Lucide with stroke-width 1.5\\n  - Button style: solid fill with subtle hover states\\n  - Links: underline on hover, not color changes\\n  - Overall density: spacious but not wastefully empty\\n  - Content arrangement: centered layouts with clear focal points\\n  - Border treatment: subtle rounded corners (4px)\\n  - Animation: minimal, smooth transitions only\\n  \\n  The aesthetic conveys: \\\"We are serious about our product and \\n  our customers. We don't need flashy design to prove our worth.\\\"\\n  \\n  Think Linear's clarity, Vercel's technical confidence, and \\n  Stripe's business maturity rolled into one template.\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01C7tmEngzufvDZWFJci6s3X","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":44536,"cache_write_tokens":2705,"cache_read_tokens":41825,"output_tokens":829,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":2705,"cache_read_input_tokens":41825,"input_tokens":6,"output_tokens":829}},"model_name":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:50:10.242746Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_012ENz8aix3gNk2iYBUpXkTr","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"66a66dc3-d6fb-4ba4-8812-23223c1bbf55","metadata":null}
